sections.paragraph:
Original: עד

Transliteration: ‛êd

Phonetic: ayd

BDB Definition:

  1. menstruation
    1. filthy rag, stained garment (figuratively of best deeds of guilty people)

Origin: from an unused root meaning to set a period [compare H5710, H5749]

TWOT entry: 1564a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
